coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Too easy? Good. 0% into ride. Your ego wants intensity. Your body needs this.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 0% through. Low intensity, high volume. Building the engine from ground up.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Building the base. 7:48 at 70%. This is where champions are made.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 0 minutes of endurance. The pace where you question if you're working hard enough. (You are.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: 0% into ride. Smooth and steady. Build your aerobic base.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Starting threshold work. 98% for 10:00. This should hurt just enough.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Block 1: 98% FTP for 10:00. 88-95 rpm, Seated. This should feel 'comfortably hard.'
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: First block. This is race pace. This is where you spend most of a 40k TT. Own it.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Block 1/5. 10:00 in the space between 'fine' and 'please make it stop.'
coachingNotes.MIXED: Block 1: 98% FTP, 88-95 rpm, Seated. Find your rhythm. Don't overcook the start.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 1/1. 4:00 at 55%. This is the price of being better. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Set 1/5. 55% FTP, Seated. 4:00. Maintain smooth power output.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: First interval. 55% for 4:00. Set the standard. You've got this.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 1/1. 55% FTP. Your legs filed a complaint. It's under review. (It's not.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: Rep 1/1. 55% FTP, 85-95 rpm. Controlled effort. Execute the plan.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Halfway point: 41% done. The first half got you here. The second half makes you a champion.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: VO2max interval. Breathing should be gasping. After this: 2min 0s recovery before next effort.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Halfway there! 41% complete. The fitness is being built right now, in this discomfort.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Halfway! 41% complete. Your lungs want a word with management. Request denied.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Halfway: 41% done. 115% for 3:00. The real work is happening now.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: 47% done. 0 intervals left. 25 minutes total. Don't quit now.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 1. 13min of work accumulated. Quality over quantity from here.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Stay focused and execute the plan. 55%, 85-95 rpm. You've trained for this.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Interval 1/1. Your legs have opinions. Management has reviewed them. Denied.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Interval 1/1. Power: 45-55%, Cadence: 85-95 rpm, Position: Seated. Execute.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Halfway point: 51% done. The first half got you here. The second half makes you a champion.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: This one: 118% for 3:00. Next up: 2:00 recovery, then 3min at 120%.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Halfway there! 51% complete. The fitness is being built right now, in this discomfort.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Halfway! 51% complete. Your lungs want a word with management. Request denied.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Halfway: 51% done. 118% for 3:00. The real work is happening now.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 1/1. 56% through. Pain is temporary. Regret lasts forever. Finish this.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Final interval: 55% × 2:00. Then 20min easy. Finish strong.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Interval 1/1. You're starting fresh. Show yourself what you're capable of.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Interval 1/1. 29 minutes in. The good news: almost done. The bad news: 0 reps left.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Final interval. 55% × 2:00. Seated, 85-95 rpm. Finish what you started.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: You're 60% through this session. The deep work happens now, when you're tired.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 4: 120% FTP. You're 31 minutes in. Power should feel hard but repeatable. Adjust if fading.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 31 minutes of work done. 17 to go. You're right where you need to be.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 31 minutes in. Your legs filed a complaint. HR says you're the CEO. Keep going.
coachingNotes.MIXED: 31 minutes in. 120% FTP, 95-105 rpm. This builds your race-winning power.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 1/1. 34 minutes in. Your legs are lying. You have more.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 1 of 1. Target: 55% FTP, 85-95 rpm. 0 intervals remaining.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Interval 1/1. Every rep makes you stronger. Keep pushing. 0 more to go.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 66% complete. Fun fact: suffering builds character. You're very character-rich right now.

intervals.name: SS on tired legs
intervals.instruction: SS on tired legs at 90-92% FTP

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 5/6. 39 minutes in. Your legs are lying. You have more.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 5 of 6. Target: 92% FTP, 95-105 rpm. 1 intervals remaining.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Interval 5/6. Every rep makes you stronger. Keep pushing. 1 more to go.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 75% done. 1 intervals left. Only. ONLY. *nervous laughter*
coachingNotes.MIXED: 75% into session. 92%, 95-105 rpm. Focus and execute.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 6/6. 91% through. Pain is temporary. Regret lasts forever. Finish this.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Final interval: 140% × 30s. Then 4min easy. Finish strong.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Final interval! 30s at 140%. Then you're done. Make it count.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Final interval. 140% for 30s. Then 4min to question life choices.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Final interval. 140% × 30s. Standing, 95-105 rpm. Finish what you started.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 1/1. 92% through. Pain is temporary. Regret lasts forever. Finish this.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 92% complete. Rep 1/1. 60% at 85-100 rpm. Hold form — don't let it drift.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 92% through. This is your workout. Own it. 60% FTP.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 92% done. 0 intervals left. Only. ONLY. *nervous laughter*
coachingNotes.MIXED: Interval 1/1. 60% FTP × 4:12. Seated. Stay smooth. Breathe deep.
